title: Simply Fall Leaves
description: Yellow, Orange and Red leaves for Birch, Oak and Dark Oak trees.
body: Transform your Minecraft world with the **Fall Leaves Pack**, a simple yet captivating resource pack that brings the warm hues of autumn to your game. This pack retains the original tree textures but introduces a custom colormap, bathing birch, oak, and dark oak trees in stunning fall colors. Perfect for creating a cozy, seasonal atmosphere, whether you're exploring forests or building autumn-themed creations. Immerse yourself in the golden yellows, deep oranges, and rich reds of fall!
